description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test, using a cache keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores .npm, cache/Cypress, and node_modules, and defining variables CYPRESS_CACHE_FOLDER=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/cache/Cypress and npm_config_cache=$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.npm. In the build stage add an install job that runs on the cypress/base:10 image and executes `npm ci`, `$(npm bin)/cypress cache path`, `$(npm bin)/cypress cache list`, and `$(npm bin)/cypress verify`. In the test stage add a cypress-e2e job on the cypress/base:10 image that runs `$(npm bin)/cypress run`, and a cypress-e2e-chrome job on the cypress/browsers:chrome67 image that runs `$(npm bin)/cypress run --browser chrome`; both test jobs publish artifacts that always include the cypress/screenshots and cypress/videos directories, JUnit reports matching results/TEST-*.xml, and expire after one week. The pipeline runs on all branches with no additional rules.
